alerts.enableLabel: Monitor feature usage against configured thresholds
alerts.enableDescription: Get notified when usage crosses configured thresholds for this feature
alerts.criticalHelp: Alert when usage reaches critical level
alerts.warningHelp: Alert when usage reaches warning level
alerts.infoHelp: Alert when usage reaches info level
alerts.toastAtLeastOneThreshold: Please configure at least one threshold level

alerts.toastInvalidWarningThreshold: Please enter a valid warning threshold value
alerts.toastInvalidInfoThreshold: Please enter a valid info threshold value

form.name: Name*
form.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for the feature
form.conversionFormula: Unit Value = Display Value * Conversion Factor
form.eventNameHelp: A unique identifier for the event used to filter and measure usage e.g. user_signup, api_calls, etc.
form.eventFiltersSubtitle: Filter events based on specific properties e.g., region, user type or custom attributes to refine tracking.
form.aggregationFieldHelp: Specify the property in the event data that will be aggregated. e.g. tokens, messages_sent, storage_used.
form.aggregationMultiplierHelp: Specify the multiplier for the aggregation. e.g. 1.5, 0.25, or 1000.
form.bucketSizeHelp: The size of the window to aggregate over. eg. 15MIN, 30MIN, HOUR, etc.
form.groupByHelp: Field to group aggregation by. Must be a string (e.g. event property name).
